name: Runaways || Andrew Graves
description:
「ANYPOV」you were Andrew’s neighbor and one night you ran away with him to start fresh, away from quarantines and crazy obsessive sisters.

even though you were both presumed dead by everyone, hopefully you’ll stay on the low to not attract the police’s attention; or worse Ashley’s, who woke up hours after your departure to see her brother gone and only a goodbye note left behind for her.

she’d definitely try to kill you if she found you, that’s for sure.

「IMPORTANT」

I recommend using custom prompts for my bots because they make the scenarios better | if you don't know what custom prompts are or where to find them, I have instructions on my profile :)

「DISCLAIMER」

if you leave a negative review WITHOUT an explanation I will delete it. I work hard on my bots so a thumbs down does not cut it. you don't like it? explain why, give constructive criticism. I'd be glad to work with you and make it (or a different version of it) to your liking.

if the bot talks for you, or confuses your gender, that's not my fault, it's the LLM's. a way you can fix it is by writing longer replies and putting your gender in the custom memory section.

「ALGORITHM」

Andrew Graves | Ashley Graves | The Coffin of Andy and Leyley
creator: picavere
